llm_operation.reason: TensorFlow tf.einsum does not support scalar-only equation '->' with zero-dim input — it expects at least one indexed operand; MindSpore also rejects '->' alone for scalars. Per docs, valid scalar reduction requires explicit index (e.g., '->') is invalid; correct form is '' (empty string) or omitting output, but TF requires non-empty equation with indices. Fix: use 'i->' with 1D singleton tensor to enable sum-reduction semantics.
